article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.1. Recognizing Anti-Palestinian Racism within the Burnaby Anti-Racism Framework 2026-01-27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on adding anti-Palestinian racism to Burnaby's Anti-Racism Framework
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on officially recognizing anti-Palestinian racism (APR) by adding its definition and framework into the City's existing Anti-Racism Framework — a policy document that guides how the City addresses discrimination.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — it may affect how your workplace discrimination policies align with City standards.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Anti-Racism Framework APR inclusion — Council vote
